meta.name: Pentatonic
meta.description: Empty pentatonic world — all samples and playback logic removed. Currently a silent canvas with only the corner scale definitions intact, ready for a fresh sound system. Four pentatonic flavors per corner: sp=major pentatonic (0 2 4 7 9), ss=minor pentatonic (0 3 5 7 10), fp=suspended pentatonic (0 2 5 7 9), fs=hirajoshi-flavored pentatonic (0 2 3 7 8).
